corrections.note: First occurrence in body line reads Δανιήλ on page.
Outer-margin/page line indicator 19 (20) is present in image after ὤρθρισε and omitted from transcript body; line numbers should be treated as marginalia, not verse text.
Printed marginal line number 20 (21) omitted.
Image shows verse number 21 then marginal line number 21 (22) before Δανιήλ ἐπήκουσε.
Marginal line number 22 (23) appears after μεγάλῃ; transcript instead runs text together.
Duplicated καὶ; page has only one.

corrections.current: καθότι δικαιοσύνη εὑ- ρέθη ἐμοὶ εὑρέθη ἐναντίον αὐτοῦ
corrections.correct: καθότι δικαιοσύνη εὑρέθη ἐμοὶ ἐναντίον αὐτοῦ
corrections.note: Transcript duplicates εὑρέθη across line break.

corrections.current: τὸν Δανιήλ, ὡς οὐ παρηνώχλησαν αὐτῷ οἱ λέοντες.
corrections.correct: τὸν Δανιήλ, ὡς οὐ παρηνώχλησαν αὐτῷ οἱ λέοντες. 23 (24)
corrections.note: Marginal line number omitted after λέοντες.
Verse number spacing and marginal line number omitted.

corrections.current: πᾶσι τοῖς ἔθνεσι καὶ χώραις καὶ χώραις τοῖς οἰκοῦσιν
corrections.correct: πᾶσι τοῖς ἔθνεσι καὶ γλώσσαις καὶ χώραις τοῖς οἰκοῦσιν
corrections.note: Body reads καὶ γλώσσαις, but transcript has repeated καὶ χώραις, apparently influenced by apparatus note.
Spacing before verse number.
Marginal line number omitted after ἔσομαι.
Proper name capitalized in print.

corrections.current: Ἔτους πρώτου βασιλεύοντος Βαλτασὰρ χώρας Βαβυλωνίας
corrections.correct: 1 Ἔτους πρώτου βασιλεύοντος Βαλτασὰρ χώρας Βαβυλωνίας
corrections.note: Verse number 1 omitted at chapter opening.
Accent on κεφαλήν should be grave before following word.

corrections.current: τότε Δανιὴλ τὸ ὅραμα, ὃ εἶδεν, ἔγραφεν
corrections.correct: τότε Δανιὴλ τὸ ὅραμα, ὃ εἶδεν, ἔγραφεν 1 VII
corrections.note: At right margin the page shows line indicator 1 and chapter numeral VII after αὐτοῦ; transcript omits these marginal elements.
Verse number spacing and marginal line number at line end/start not fully represented.
Apparatus prints accented Greek form.
Accent missing on γλώσσαις.
Transcript misrenders final letters with Latin s; printed form is Greek προσκυνῆτες.
Greek accents omitted.
Accents omitted in Greek phrase.

uncertain.note: Several outer-margin line indicators (21 (22), 22 (23)) are visible and placement in transcript is inconsistent; exact insertion points may need separate marginalia handling.
The printed '1 VII' at the end of the line may be running chapter/line indicator rather than body text; included above only as possible omitted marginal element.

notes: Main substantive body error is apparatus contamination at 6:25: body should read καὶ γλώσσαις, not repeated καὶ χώραις. Many other issues are omitted or mishandled marginal line indicators and a few duplicated/incorrect words. Running head matches. Apparatus mostly correct but has several accent/transliteration issues.
